gates.name: build
gates.command: cd workflow-engine/ui && node --check js/main.js && node --check js/api.js && node --check sw.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const required=['index.html','styles.css','js/main.js','js/api.js','manifest.json','sw.js','vercel.json']; for (const file of required) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error('missing '+file); } JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('vercel.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); if (!html.includes('type=\"module\" src=\"./js/main.js\"')) throw new Error('index.html missing module entry');"
